UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within the Wiga Sales Hub application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile.

role.description: User's role within the organization (e.g., Administrator, Sales Director, Sales Executive, Support).

Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Represents a sales lead, tracking potential customers.

companyName.description: Name of the company the lead represents.

contactName.description: Name of the contact person at the lead company.

contactEmail.description: Email address of the contact person.

contactPhone.description: Phone number of the contact person.

leadSource.description: Source from which the lead originated (e.g., website, referral, advertisement).

leadStatus.description: Current status of the lead (e.g., New, Contacted, Qualified, Closed).

assignedTo.description: Reference to UserProfile. ID of the sales representative assigned to the lead. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Lead)

purchaseProbability.description: Probability of the lead resulting in a sale (0-100).

solutionInterest.description: The solution the lead is interested in.

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Represents an interaction with a lead.

leadId.description: Reference to Lead. ID of the lead associated with the activity. (Relationship: Lead 1:N Activity)

activityType.description: Type of activity (e.g., Call, Meeting, Email).

dateTime.description: Date and time of the activity.

Quote.title: Quote
Quote.description: Represents a sales quote for a lead.

leadId.description: Reference to Lead. ID of the lead associated with the quote. (Relationship: Lead 1:N Quote)

solution.description: The solution associated with the quote.

validUntil.description: Date the quote is valid until.

hardwareItems.description: List of hardware products included in the quote.

installationItems.description: List of installation items included in the quote.

serviceItems.description: List of service items included in the quote.

status.description: Status of the quote (e.g., Draft, Sent, Accepted, Rejected).

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own profile.
Stores leads associated with a specific user. Path-based ownership enables secure listing scoped to the user.
Stores activities associated with a specific lead. Path-based ownership ensures only the user and assigned lead can access activities.
Stores quotes associated with a specific user and their leads.
Stores price items specific to a user or organization.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is designed to ensure security, scalability, and debuggability, adhering to the principles of Authorization Independence and Structural Segregation. User profiles are stored under `/users/{userId}` for private data, ensuring only the user can access their profile. Leads, Activities, Quotes, and Price Items are nested under `/users/{userId}` to maintain a clear ownership hierarchy, reflecting the 1:N relationships. This approach eliminates the need for `get()` calls in security rules, enabling atomic operations and simplifies debugging.  For QAPs, this structure leverages path-based ownership. Listing leads, activities, or quotes is always scoped to a specific user, avoiding the need for complex filtering in rules. This structure prioritizes clear ownership and avoids mixing data with different access needs in the same collections.
